# Seed Starting Notes

- [technique] Pre-soak large seeds overnight before sowing #seeds (speeds germination)
- [gotcha] Bottom heat dries the surface quickly (check twice daily)
- [fact] Most warm-season crops germinate near twenty degrees Celsius #seeds
- [requirement] Label every tray at sowing time #organization
